allow-extension-exports.description: preserves exports for modules with allow-extension signature

allow-extension-exports-with-explicat-fi.description: generate the separate chunk for the entry module with explicated file name

allow-extension-exports-with-explicat-na.description: generate a separate chunk for the entry module with explicit name in input options

allow-extension-merge-same-exports.description: merges same exports for modules with allow-extension signature

amd-id-auto-base-path.description: allows to use amd.autoId with amd.basePath, and chunks folder

amd-id-auto-base-path-concat.description: allows to use amd.autoId with amd.basePath and works when concat'd into one file

asset-needs-code-reference.description: does not emit unreferenced assets if needsCodeReference is true

asset-needs-code-reference-same-source.description: emits unreferenced assets if needsCodeReference is true if they are also emitted without that flag

avoid-chunk-import-hoisting.description: avoids hoisting transitive dependencies via flag

chunk-assigment-in-dynamic.description: the content of c.js is complete

chunk-live-bindings.description: ES module live bindings in chunks

circular-chunks-warning-caused-by-manual.description: Throw a warning for circular chunks caused by manual chunks conflict

circular-chunks-warning-caused-by-only-e.description: Throw a warning for circular chunks caused by onlyExplicitManualChunks

circular-entry-points2.description: does not create a facade for one circular entry point if possible

circular-entry-points3.description: creates facades for all circular entry points if they become tainted by another entry

circular-manual-chunks.description: handles manual chunks with circular dependencies

custom-sanitizer.description: supports custom file name sanitizer functions

deconflict-globals.description: does not deconflict due to global variables used in other chunks

deconflict-system-default-export-variabl.description: deconflicts SystemJS default export variable with namespace imports

deduplicate-imports-referencing-original.description: do not import variables that reference an original if the original is already imported
do not import variables that reference an original if another variable referencing it is already imported

default-export-name-conflict.description: does not produce name conflicts when reexporting via default exports

default-reexport-namespace.description: Properly handle adding a default reexport to a namespace (#3583)

deprecated/emit-file/filenames-function-.description: supports using a function that returns a pattern for FileNames

deprecated/emit-file/generate-emission-n.description: updates asset names when emitting in generate phase

dynamic-import.description: handles dynamic imports with a shared dependency

dynamic-import-comments.description: does not remove inline comments inside dynamic imports

dynamic-import-external.description: marks dynamic imports as external when resolveDynamicImport returns false

dynamic-import-facade.description: makes sure dynamic chunks are not tainted

dynamic-import-from-manual-chunk.description: handles dynamic imports in manual chunks

dynamic-import-inline-colouring.description: Handle dynamic imports that are part of a static graph

dynamic-import-inlining-object.description: supports an object with a single entry when inlining dynamic imports

dynamic-import-object-property-tree-shak.description: Supports tree-shaking for dynamic import object properties when using "await"
Supports tree-shaking for dynamic import object properties when using "then"

dynamic-import-only-default.description: correctly imports dynamic namespaces with only a default export from entry- and non-entry-point chunks

dynamic-import-only-reexports.description: handles dynamic imports when the imported module only reexports from other modules

dynamic-import-statically-imported.description: handles dynamic imports of previously statically imported chunks

dynamic-import-statically-imported-2.description: handles dynamic imports of previously statically imported chunks that are also dynamically imported by other chunks

dynamic-import-synthetic-exports-preserv.description: handle dynamically importing a module with synthetic named exports when preserving modules

dynamic-import-tree-shaking-1.description: uses tree-shaking information to improve chunking

dynamic-import-tree-shaking-2.description: does not expose exports of chunks which were used by tree-shaken dynamic imports

dynamic-import-with-namespace.description: The all cases of tree-shaking for dynamic import with namespace

dynamically-import-facaded-entry.description: uses existing entry facades for dynamic imports if present

dynamically-import-non-preserved-entry.description: supports dynamically importing entries with additional exports

dynamically-import-tainted-entry.description: supports dynamically importing entries with additional exports

dynamically-import-untainted-entry.description: makes existing entries a proper facade if possible when importing dynamically

emit-file/deduplicate-assets.description: deduplicates asset that have the same source

emit-file/emit-asset-without-name.description: supports emitting an asset without a name

emit-file/emit-chunk.description: allows adding additional chunks and retrieving their file name

emit-file/emit-chunk-facade.description: retrieves the correct name of an emitted chunk in case a facade is created

emit-file/emit-chunk-filename.description: supports specifying a file name when emitting a chunk

emit-file/emit-chunk-name-conflict.description: deduplicates named chunks emitted more than once

emit-file/emit-chunk-order1.description: creates a consistent chunking order (needs to be consistent with the other test of this kind)

emit-file/emit-chunk-order2.description: creates a consistent chunking order (needs to be consistent with the other test of this kind)

emit-file/emit-chunk-with-importer.description: allows specifying an importer when resolving ids

emit-file/emit-chunk-worker.description: allows adding additional chunks to be used in workers

emit-file/emit-chunk-worklet.description: allows adding additional chunks to be used in worklets

emit-file/emits-files-from-various-hooks.description: supports emitting assets from plugin hooks

emit-file/filenames-function-patterns.description: supports using a function that returns a pattern for FileNames

emit-file/filenames-function-patterns-pr.description: supports using a function that returns a pattern for entryFileNames, with output.preserveModules option

emit-file/generate-emission-names.description: updates asset names when emitting in generate phase

emit-file/named-user-chunks.description: deduplicates with named chunks defined by the user

emit-file/sanitize-file-name.description: allows adding additional chunks and retrieving their file name

emit-file/set-asset-source.description: supports setting the asset source during generate

empty-module-no-treeshake.description: associates empty modules with chunks if tree-shaking is disabled for them

entry-point-without-own-code.description: Handles entry points that contain no own code except imports and exports

entry-without-code.description: optimizes chunks when an entry point without own code is imported from another entry

entry-without-code-dynamic.description: optimizes chunks when a dynamic entry point without own code is imported from another entry

export-default-from-entry.description: correctly imports the default from an entry point

external-imports.description: uses correct interop per chunk when importing from external modules

external-reexports.description: uses correct interop per chunk when reexporting from external modules

facades-with-external-reexports.description: ignores external reexports of other entries when finding facades

facades-with-reexports.description: ignores reexports of other entries when finding facades

generated-code/reserved-names-as-props-f.description: escapes reserved names used as props

generated-code/reserved-names-as-props-t.description: escapes reserved names used as props

hashing/tree-shaken-dynamic-hash.description: Does not fail when calculating the hash of a file containing a tree-shaken dynamic import

ignore-chunk-name-query.description: ignores queries and hashes for chunk names when preserving modules

implicit-dependencies/dependant-entry-no.description: properly emits a chunk when it is implicitly loaded after an empty entry module

implicit-dependencies/implicitly-depende.description: makes sure emitted entry points are never implicit dependencies
makes sure emitted entry points are never implicit dependencies
makes sure actual entry points are never implicit dependencies

implicit-dependencies/multiple-dependenc.description: supports emitting the same chunk with different and multiple dependencies

implicit-dependencies/preserve-signature.description: supports implicit dependencies when emitting files
supports implicit dependencies when emitting files
supports implicit dependencies when emitting files

implicit-dependencies/same-chunk-depende.description: handles implicit dependencies where the dependent is inlined into the same chunk

implicit-dependencies/shared-dependency-.description: handles shared dependencies between implicit chunks without side-effects
handles shared dependencies when there are only reexports

implicit-dependencies/single-dependency.description: supports implicit dependencies when emitting files

import-meta-numeric-paths.description: supports nested numeric paths without issues on Windows

improved-dynamic-chunks/chained-dynamic-.description: chained dynamic import that imports something already loaded

improved-dynamic-chunks/cut-off.description: does not avoid separate chunks if too many modules dynamically import the same chunk

improved-dynamic-chunks/dynamic-import-a.description: inlines dynamic imports that are already statically imported
inlines dynamic imports that are already statically imported by their importers

improved-dynamic-chunks/dynamic-import-d.description: handles if a dynamically imported module imports another module dynamically
handles if a dynamically imported module imports another module dynamically

improved-dynamic-chunks/dynamic-not-in-m.description: keeps chunks separate when not in memory for all dynamic imports

improved-dynamic-chunks/multi-entry-diff.description: avoids chunks for always loaded dependencies if multiple entry points with different dependencies have dynamic imports
avoids chunks for always loaded dependencies if multiple entry points with different dependencies have dynamic imports

improved-dynamic-chunks/multi-entry-part.description: avoids chunks for always loaded dependencies if multiple entry points with different dependencies have dynamic imports

improved-dynamic-chunks/multi-entry-shar.description: avoids chunks for always loaded dependencies if multiple entry points with different dependencies have dynamic imports

improved-dynamic-chunks/single-dynamic.description: does not create a separate chunk if a dynamically imported chunk shares a dependency with its importer

improved-dynamic-chunks/single-dynamic-m.description: does not create a separate chunk if a dynamically imported chunk shares a dependency with its importer, and dynamic chunk imported from multiple places

indirect-reexports-preserve-modules.description: does not drop indirect reexports when preserving modules

interop-per-reexported-default-dependenc.description: allows to configure the interop type per reexported default from an external dependency

manual-chunk-avoid-facade.description: avoid facades if possible when using manual chunks

manual-chunk-contains-entry-conflict.description: Uses entry alias if manual chunks contain entry chunks with different alias

manual-chunk-contains-entry-match.description: Identifies the entry chunk with the manual chunk that contains it if the aliases match

manual-chunk-is-entry-conflict.description: Uses entry alias if manual chunks are entry chunks with different alias

manual-chunk-is-entry-match.description: Identifies the entry chunk with the manual chunk that has the same entry if the aliases match

manual-chunk-not-included.description: handles manual chunks where the root is not part of the module graph

manual-chunks-different-nested.description: manual chunks can have other manual chunks as dependencies

manual-chunks-dynamic-facades.description: creates facades for dynamic manual chunks if necessary

manual-chunks-dynamic-name-conflict.description: handles name conflicts in manual chunks

manual-chunks-function.description: allows to define manual chunks via a function

manual-chunks-nested.description: manual chunks can contain nested modules

manual-chunks-only-explicit-dependencies.description: manual chunks function form with onlyExplicitManualChunks does not merge non specified dependencies into the output chunk. Instead it lets Rollup normal chunking logic output them separately.
manual chunks object form merges the specified modules' dependencies into the output chunk

min-chunk-size/avoid-circular-dependenci.description: avoids circular dependencies when merging chunks
avoids circular dependencies when merging chunks

min-chunk-size/avoid-transitive-side-eff.description: does not merge chunks if a dependency would introduce a new side effect

min-chunk-size/best-merge-target.description: uses the merge target that is closest

min-chunk-size/ignore-correlated-side-ef.description: ignores correlated side effects if they cannot be merged

min-chunk-size/merge-chunk-into-distant-.description: merges small chunks into shared chunks that are loaded by a non-close super-set of entry points

min-chunk-size/merge-chunk-into-shared.description: merges small chunks into shared chunks that are loaded by a super-set of entry points

min-chunk-size/merge-correlated-side-eff.description: merges correlated side effects with pure chunks

min-chunk-size/merge-dependency-side-eff.description: merges chunks if their dependency side effects are the same

min-chunk-size/merge-despite-correlated-.description: merges chunks if their dependency side effects are a subset of the other's correlated side effects

min-chunk-size/merge-dynamic-imports.description: merges small chunks without side effects into suitable chunks

min-chunk-size/merge-small-side-effect-c.description: merges small chunks with side effects into suitable pure chunks

min-chunk-size/merge-unrelated.description: merges unrelated small chunks if there is no better alternative

min-chunk-size/merge-with-entry-side-eff.description: merges dynamic imports even when the entry has side effects

min-chunk-size/no-merge-for-big-chunks.description: does not merge chunks if all chunks are below the size limit

min-chunk-size/no-merge-side-effects.description: does not merge small chunks that have side effects

min-chunk-size/prefer-close-merge-target.description: when there are two valid merge targets, the one that is loaded under more similar conditions is preferred
when there are two valid merge targets, the one that is loaded under more similar conditions is preferred

min-chunk-size/prefer-small-merge-target.description: when there are two equally valid merge targets, the smaller is preferred
when there are two equally valid merge targets, the smaller is preferred

min-chunk-size/track-external-effects.description: tracks external imports as side effects

min-chunk-size/track-external-effects2.description: does not tracks external imports as side effects if they are marked as side effect free

min-chunk-size/tree-shaking.description: takes tree-shaking into account and ignores top-level comments

minify-internal-exports.description: allows to force the minification of internal exports

missing-export-reused-deconflicting.description: handles using dependencies with shimmed missing exports as

multiple-entry-points.description: handles multiple entry points with a shared dependency

namespace-reexport-name-conflict.description: renders namespaces with reexports that conflict with existing imports

namespace-reexport-side-effect-cache.description: correctly tracks side-effect dependencies for multiple importers through namespace reexport cache

namespace-retracing.description: internal reexported namespaces over chunk boundaries

namespace-tostring/dynamic-import.description: adds Symbol.toStringTag property to dynamic imports

namespace-tostring/dynamic-import-defaul.description: adds Symbol.toStringTag property to dynamic imports of entry chunks with default export mode

nested-dynamic-imports.description: handles dynamic imports containing dynamic imports

no-minify-internal-exports.description: allows to disable the minification of internal exports

no-treeshake-imports.description: includes all imports when setting moduleSideEffects to "no-treeshake"

option-virtual-dirname.description: expect the directory name for "virtual" files to be rollup_virtual

preserve-entry-signatures/exports-only.description: Creates a facade if necessary for exports-only if there are exports

preserve-entry-signatures/exports-only-n.description: Does not create a facade for exports-only if there are no exports

preserve-entry-signatures/false.description: Does not include entry exports and does not preserve the signature

preserve-entry-signatures/override-via-p.description: Allows overriding behaviour for emitted chunks

preserve-entry-signatures/strict.description: Creates a facade if necessary for strict entry signatures

preserve-modules-auto-export-mode.description: Uses entry point semantics for all files when preserving modules

preserve-modules-default-mode-namespace.description: import namespace from chunks with default export mode when preserving modules

preserve-modules-default-mode-namespace2.description: import namespace from chunks with default export mode when preserving modules

preserve-modules-dynamic-imports.description: dynamic imports are handled correctly when preserving modules

preserve-modules-export-alias.description: confirm export aliases are preserved in modules

preserve-modules-filename-pattern.description: entryFileNames pattern supported in combination with preserveModules

preserve-modules-named-export-mode.description: respects "named" export mode in all chunks when preserving modules

preserve-modules-namespace-reexport-reex.description: handles doing a namespace reexport of a reexport

preserve-modules-nested-export.description: confirm exports are preserved when exporting a module

preserve-modules-scriptified-assets.description: scriptified assets have extension in preserveModules output filename

preserve-modules-special-chunk-names.description: Supports chunk names from config when preserving modules

reexport-from-entry.description: allows reexporting from other entry points

relative-external-outside-output.description: allows relative external dependencies outside of output dir

remove-attribute-declarations-for-intern.description: Remove the attribute declarations for internal dynamic imports

render-chunk.description: transforms chunks in the renderChunk hook, also transforming hashes added in the hook

render-chunk-transform.description: replaces hashes when mutating chunk info in renderChunk

render-dynamic-import.description: supports custom rendering for dynamic imports

render-dynamic-import-extended.description: supports extended custom rendering for dynamic imports

resolve-dynamic-import.description: Supports all resolution formats for dynamic imports

resolve-file-url-obj.description: allows to use ROLLUP_FILE_URL_OBJ to get URL objects directly

sanitize-internal-exports.description: make sure internal exports are sanitized

sanitize-percent-encoding3.description: make sure illegal percent encoding is sanitized for virtual entry points
